controls.name: Logical & Physical Access Security
controls.detail: EXECVE_GUARD + eBPF execve tracepoint kills unauthorized shell from web processes.

controls.name: Logical Access from Untrusted Networks
controls.detail: XDP/BPF edge blacklist with ipset fallback; ban pipeline IPC→XDP→ipset.

controls.name: System Monitoring & Anomaly Detection
controls.detail: SIEM forwarder + log-guardian metrics; EPS and alert counters.

controls.name: Security Event Response
controls.detail: MITRE-tagged alerts, incident engine, AUTO_BAN_MIN_RISK policy.

controls.name: Web Application Protection
controls.detail: PCRE2-JIT WAF + OpenAPI strict v2 schema firewall.

controls.name: Audit Log Implementation
controls.detail: HMAC-signed JSON audit log + SQLite events.db + ban-policy audit JSONL.

controls.name: Intrusion Detection
controls.detail: inotify honey-trap + eBPF lineage attack tree.

controls.name: Kişisel Verilerin Güvenliği
controls.detail: Teknik/idari tedbirler: şifreli audit (HMAC), tenant DB ayrımı, erişim kontrolü.

controls.name: Veri Sorumlusu Yükümlülükleri
controls.detail: Olay kaydı, ihlal tespiti ve otomatik engelleme kanıtı (events.db).

controls.name: Veri Güvenliğine İlişkin Yükümlülükler
controls.detail: False-positive oranı hedefi <%5; adaptive FP trust EMA.

controls.name: Kişisel Verilerin İşlenme Şartları
controls.detail: Log minimizasyonu: whitelist, FP suppression, tenant-scoped telemetry.

controls.name: Information Security Incident Management
controls.detail: Mesh/etcd threat intel + threat feed pipeline (AbuseIPDB/OTX/STIX).
